para_trans: Subsidy for disbursement of the amount collected towards stamp duty of 9% to the respective Municipal Councils / Nagar Panchayats.
Government Correctional Certificate No. Mudrashu-0425 / Q.No.60 / NV-32
1) Government Circular No.Finance-2025 / Q.44 / Q.3, dated 07.04.2025 of the Department of Finance.
2) Urban Development Department, Government Decision No. Mudrashu-0425 / P.No.60 / NV-32D. December 30, 2025
3) Urban Development Department, Government Decision No. Mudrashu-0425 / P.No.60 / NV-32D. February 28, 2026
4) Urban Development Department, Government Decision No. Mudrashu-0425 / P.No.60 / NV-232D. On the 17th of March, 2026

Paragraph No. 1 of the Government Decision in Reference. Instead of "(Rupees one crore sixty-four thousand only)" mentioned in 4B7, read "(Rupees two hundred crore one lakh sixty-four thousand only)."
This government certificate is made available on the government's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
